notes: MIF-006 rate decoding is measured for Python and Rust over the committed 256-event AER fixture.
Event timestamps, explicit window starts, and decode-window lengths are bounded to the shared u64 nanosecond domain; u64 stop overflow fails closed.
Non-isolated local comparison run on a workstation with powersave governor and nontrivial host load; do not treat as a production performance claim.
